title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind that generates, debates, and iteratively refines novel scientific hypotheses for complex research problems. It aims to accelerate scientific discovery by partnering with researchers to formulate and test breakthrough ideas.
